title: resolve_client_id returns Cow<'_, str> to avoid unconditional allocation
description: resolve_client_id returns Cow::Borrowed when the caller supplies a client_id, allocating nothing. It returns Cow::Owned only when generating a ULID. A contributor might suggest returning String always ('simpler return type'). That would allocate and copy the caller's string on every call even when the caller already owns it. The Cow return is correct here: callers pass &str and the result is used immediately as &str (via Deref), so no clone ever occurs on the happy path.
close_reason: Decision record: current implementation is correct; no code change needed
